title: Terminal Workflow for Textbook Development
description: Interactive Mermaid visualization for terminal workflow for textbook development
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
mermaid
learningObjectives: Identify the role of each of three terminals in textbook development: the mkdocs serve dev server, Python validation scripts, and Git operations
Sequence the command workflow from mkdocs serve through learning-graph validation to git commit, push, and mkdocs gh-deploy
Explain why validation scripts must pass before committing, including confirming the learning graph is a valid DAG with no circular dependencies
Distinguish pushing markdown source with git push origin main from publishing the built site with mkdocs gh-deploy
